[Jelaskan perubahan yang Anda lakukan]

## Tipe Perubahan

- [ ] Fitur baru
- [ ] Perbaikan bug
- [ ] Dokumentasi
- [ ] Refactor/Performance
- [ ] Lainnya (jelaskan)

## Dampak

- [ ] Backend (Rust) — `src-tauri/`
- [ ] Frontend (Svelte) — `src/`
- [ ] CI/CD — `.github/workflows/`
- [ ] Dokumentasi — `docs/`
- [ ] Tidak ada dampak (hanya dokumentasi)

## Verifikasi

- [ ] `npm run check` — TypeScript/Svelte 0 errors
- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo test` — Rust tests pass
- [ ] `cargo build` — 0 errors
